name: idea-to-ship
description: Three composable skills for taking an idea from fuzzy to validated to sequenced build to shipped: ideate, deep-dive, and prompt-pack.

interface.shortDescription: Take an idea from fuzzy → validated → sequenced build → shipped
interface.longDescription: The missing front half of AI-assisted building, as three composable skills: ideate (decide what's worth building, with a forced success metric and kill criterion), deep-dive (validate it rigorously via parallel specialists + an adversarial red-team), and prompt-pack (sequence the build into self-contained prompts that survive context limits). Each works alone; together they form one idea→ship pipeline.
defaultPrompt: I have an idea for something I want to build — is it any good?
Do a deep dive on this codebase before I ship it.
This change is too big for one chat — make me a prompt pack.
